params.name: Xi Ping Stele Script
params.description: The Xi Ping Stele Scriptures, a collection of the seven Confucian classics widely recognized during the Han Dynasty, include the Book of Changes, Book of Documents, Book of Songs, Commentary of Zuo, Book of Rites, Gongyang Commentary, and The Analects. The aim was to standardize the texts of the scriptures and to prevent errors that might occur during the process of transcription. The scriptures were carved onto forty-six stone steles, with each character engraved only once, standardizing the sc …
